tasks.subject: Task 1: Add BrowserPendingMap to AppState and route BrowserResponse in device gateway
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enable the hub to track pending browser requests and match inbound BrowserResponse envelopes to waiting HTTP handlers.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs
- Modify: crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-hub

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AppState has browser_pending DashMap field", "Inbound BrowserResponse matched by request_id via oneshot", "Unmatched BrowserResponse logged and discarded", "Existing job handling unaffected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add POST /api/browser HTTP handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the browser HTTP endpoint that receives browser commands, sends them to devices via WebSocket, and awaits responses.

**Files:**
- Create: crates/ahand-hub/src/http/browser.rs
- Modify: crates/ahand-hub/src/http/mod.rs
- Modify: crates/ahand-hub/Cargo.toml

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-hub

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/http/browser.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/http/mod.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/browser accepts request with dashboard auth", "Builds BrowserRequest protobuf and sends via ConnectionRegistry", "Returns JSON with base64-encoded binary data", "404 if device offline, 400 if no browser capability, 504 on timeout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Integration tests for browser API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Test the full browser request-response flow through hub, including error cases.

**Files:**
- Modify: crates/ahand-hub/tests/support/mod.rs
- Create: crates/ahand-hub/tests/browser_api.rs

**Verify:** cargo test -p ahand-hub browser

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/tests/support/mod.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/tests/browser_api.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub browser", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Roundtrip test passes", "Binary data test passes", "Offline device returns 404", "No capability returns 400", "Timeout returns 504", "Unauthenticated returns 401"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DeviceBrowser React component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the DeviceBrowser component by porting the old SolidJS BrowserPanel to React.

**Files:**
- Create: apps/hub-dashboard/src/components/device-browser.tsx

**Verify:** cd apps/hub-dashboard && npx next build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/hub-dashboard/src/components/device-browser.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/hub-dashboard && npx next build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Session config with session ID input", "Actions: URL+Open, Selector, Value+Fill, Snapshot/Click/Fill/Screenshot/Download/PDF/Close", "Collapsible Custom Command section", "Response log with image preview and download links", "Loading state and Clear button"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Integrate Browser tab into DeviceTabs and add styles
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the Browser tab into the device detail page with capability gate and CSS styles.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/hub-dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/devices/[id]/page.tsx
- Modify: apps/hub-dashboard/src/components/device-tabs.tsx
- Modify: apps/hub-dashboard/src/app/globals.css

**Verify:** cd apps/hub-dashboard && npx next build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/hub-dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/devices/[id]/page.tsx", "apps/hub-dashboard/src/components/device-tabs.tsx", "apps/hub-dashboard/src/app/globals.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/hub-dashboard && npx next build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Browser tab only visible when online + browser capability", "capabilities passed from device detail page", "Default tab selection logic correct", "Browser panel styles match dark theme"]}
```
